_comment: 3:2-lock long-confirm variant (Hades 131k, M0=180). NOT the gated config — experiment for phase4/alpha_centauri.yaml resonance follow-up.

bodies.name: Dante
bodies._design_note: Canon [GAME]: innermost moon, orbits 'as close as possible without being torn apart' (Roche edge) with perpetual volcanism + moonquakes from Polyphemus tidal forces. a=100,000 km sits just outside the ~94,000 km fluid Roche limit (rocky rho=3) -> the canonical Roche-edge placement. STABILITY: a heavy (7e22) Dante mutually pumps Hades into a crossing ejection; reduced to a small inner MOONLET (8e21 kg, r 900 km) like Jupiter's inner moonlets (Metis/Adrastea) that coexist with Io — so it no longer pumps Hades. Roche-edge tides keep it volcanic regardless of size. e=0.01, mass/radius INVENTED.

bodies.name: Hades
bodies._design_note: 3:2-LOCK CONFIRM variant: a=131000 (exact 3:2 w/ Dante), M0=180 (anti-aligned) — the phase-scan libration candidate. Long-run test, not the gated config.

bodies.name: Pandora
bodies._design_note: Avatar canon: the 5th moon, Na'vi homeworld. mass 0.72 M_earth (4.30e24 kg), diameter 11,447 km (r 5724 km). Tidally locked -> 27 h day = orbital period -> Kepler back-out around 120 M_earth Polyphemus gives a=225,000 km (Polyphemus ~31-36 deg across Pandora's sky, the films' skyline). ~0.02 R_Hill, deep inside the Domingos+2006 ~0.5 R_Hill limit. inclination relative to Polyphemus's orbital plane (canon axial tilt 29 deg is the spin axis, not the orbit).

bodies.name: Cassandra
bodies._design_note: Canon [GAME / Lightstorm 2024 panel]: the 2nd-largest moon (after Pandora), diameter >6500 km, with a N-H atmosphere + few % CO2 (possible carbon-cycle life). radius 3400 km (diameter 6800 km, satisfies >6500) at Pandora-like rho 5470 kg/m3 -> mass 9.0e23 kg. RETROGRADE: canon says the two outermost moons orbit opposite the rest, so inclination_deg=178 (~2 deg from the plane, retrograde). Retrograde moons are Hill-stable to a LARGER radius (~0.7 R_Hill vs 0.5 prograde), so this only helps. a/e/inc INVENTED (retrograde sense is canon).

bodies.name: Chaos
bodies._design_note: Canon [GAME]: orbits beyond Cassandra (the outermost named moon); a fractured Miranda-like moon with 15-30 km cliffs (likely past tidal heating). Small (Miranda r=236 km); r 400 km at fractured rho~2 g/cc -> 5.4e20 kg. RETROGRADE: one of the two outermost moons that canon says orbit opposite the rest -> inclination_deg=175 (~5 deg from plane, retrograde). a=1.5e6 km, e=0.10 INVENTED; still well inside even the prograde 0.5 R_Hill (~5.1e6 km). The 9 unnamed moonlets + the heliocentric Poly-L4/L5 co-orbital planetoids are NOT in this run (deferred).
